tEn: CosyVoice: A Scalable Multilingual Zero-shot Text-to-speech Synthesizer based on Supervised Semantic Tokens
tZh: CosyVoice：基于监督语义标记的可扩展多语言零样本文本转语音合成器
sEn: Supervised semantic tokens from multilingual ASR enable scalable zero-shot TTS with better content and speaker consistency.
sZh: 从多语言语音识别模型中提取的监督语义标记，实现了可扩展的零样本文本转语音合成，在内容一致性和说话人相似性上显著优于无监督标记。
absEn: Recent years have witnessed a trend that large language model (LLM) based text-to-speech (TTS) emerges into the mainstream due to their high naturalness and zero-shot capacity. In this paradigm, speech signals are discretized into token sequences, which are modeled by an LLM with text as prompts and reconstructed by a token-based vocoder to waveforms. Obviously, speech tokens play a critical role in LLM-based TTS models. Current speech tokens are learned in an unsupervised manner, which lacks explicit semantic information and alignment to the text. In this paper, we propose to represent speech with supervised semantic tokens, which are derived from a multilingual speech recognition model by inserting vector quantization into the encoder. Based on the tokens, we further propose a scalable zero-shot TTS synthesizer, CosyVoice, which consists of an LLM for text-to-token generation and a conditional flow matching model for token-to-speech synthesis. Experimental results show that supervised semantic tokens significantly outperform existing unsupervised tokens in terms of content consistency and speaker similarity for zero-shot voice cloning. Moreover, we find that utilizing large-scale data further improves the synthesis performance, indicating the scalable capacity of CosyVoice. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to involve supervised speech tokens into TTS models.
absZh: 近年来，基于大语言模型的文本转语音技术因其高自然度和零样本能力而成为主流。在该范式中，语音信号被离散化为标记序列，由大语言模型以文本为提示进行建模，并通过基于标记的声码器重建为波形。显然，语音标记在基于大语言模型的文本转语音模型中起着关键作用。当前的语音标记以无监督方式学习，缺乏明确的语义信息和与文本的对齐。本文提出用监督语义标记表示语音，这些标记通过将向量量化插入编码器，从多语言语音识别模型中导出。基于这些标记，我们进一步提出可扩展的零样本文本转语音合成器CosyVoice，它由用于文本到标记生成的大语言模型和用于标记到语音合成的条件流匹配模型组成。实验结果表明，监督语义标记在零样本语音克隆的内容一致性和说话人相似性方面显著优于现有的无监督标记。此外，我们发现利用大规模数据可进一步提高合成性能，表明CosyVoice的可扩展能力。据我们所知，这是首次尝试将监督语音标记引入文本转语音模型。

contrib.en: First integration of supervised semantic tokens into TTS models, enhancing content consistency and speaker similarity.
contrib.zh: 首次将监督语义令牌集成到TTS模型中，提升了内容一致性和说话人相似度。

contrib.en: Proposes CosyVoice, a scalable zero-shot TTS synthesizer combining an LLM for text-to-token generation and a conditional flow matching model for token-to-speech synthesis.
contrib.zh: 提出CosyVoice，一种可扩展的零样本TTS合成器，结合了用于文本到令牌生成的LLM和用于令牌到语音合成的条件流匹配模型。

contrib.en: Eliminates need for phonemizers and forced aligners by using a direct text-to-speech pathway.
contrib.zh: 通过直接的文本到语音路径，消除了对音素器和强制对齐器的需求。

contrib.en: Incorporates x-vector into LLM to separate modeling of speech into semantic, speaker, and prosody components.
contrib.zh: 将x-vector引入LLM，将语音建模分离为语义、说话人和韵律组件。

contrib.en: Demonstrates scalability: large-scale data and model size significantly improve synthesis performance.
contrib.zh: 展示了可扩展性：大规模数据和模型大小显著提升了合成性能。

contrib.en: Achieves human parity generation quality in zero-shot voice cloning and cross-lingual scenarios.
contrib.zh: 在零样本语音克隆和跨语言场景中实现了人类级别的生成质量。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English and Chinese languages; multilingual performance on other languages not fully explored.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于英语和中文；其他语言的多语言性能尚未充分探索。

limits.en: Dependence on a pre-trained ASR model for supervised token extraction may introduce biases.
limits.zh: 依赖预训练的ASR模型进行监督令牌提取可能引入偏差。

limits.en: Single codebook with 4096 codes; impact of codebook size and number on performance not investigated.
limits.zh: 单一码本包含4096个码字；码本大小和数量对性能的影响尚未研究。

limits.en: Zero-shot voice cloning requires a reference speech sample; performance may degrade with very short or noisy samples.
limits.zh: 零样本语音克隆需要参考语音样本；对于极短或嘈杂的样本，性能可能下降。

limits.en: Instruct fine-tuning data limited to specific emotions and paralinguistic features; broader controllability not tested.
limits.zh: 指令微调数据仅限于特定情感和副语言特征；更广泛的可控性尚未测试。

items.en: Recent years have witnessed a trend that large language model (LLM) based text-to-speech (TTS) emerges into the mainstream due to their high naturalness and zero-shot capacity. In this paradigm, speech signals are discretized into token sequences, which are modeled by an LLM with text as prompts and reconstructed by a token-based vocoder to waveforms. Obviously, speech tokens play a critical role in LLM-based TTS models. Current speech tokens are learned in an unsupervised manner, which lacks explicit semantic information and alignment to the text. In this paper, we propose to represent speech with supervised semantic tokens, which are derived from a multilingual speech recognition model by inserting vector quantization into the encoder. Based on the tokens, we further propose a Codec-based synthesizer for Voice generation, CosyVoice111Models and codes are released at https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/CosyVoice. Demos can be found at https://fun-audio-llm.github.io, which consists of an LLM for text-to-token generation and a conditional flow matching model for token-to-speech synthesis. Experimental results show that supervised semantic tokens significantly outperform existing unsupervised tokens in terms of content consistency and speaker similarity for zero-shot voice cloning. Moreover, we find that utilizing large-scale data further improves the synthesis performance, indicating the scalable capacity of CosyVoice. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to involve supervised speech tokens into TTS models.
items.zh: 近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的文本转语音（TTS）技术因其高自然度和零样本能力而成为主流。在这种范式中，语音信号被离散化为词元序列，由LLM以文本为提示进行建模，并通过基于词元的声码器重建为波形。显然，语音词元在基于LLM的TTS模型中起着关键作用。当前的语音词元以无监督方式学习，缺乏明确的语义信息和与文本的对齐。本文提出用监督语义词元表示语音，这些词元通过将向量量化插入编码器，从多语言语音识别模型中导出。基于这些词元，我们进一步提出了一种基于编解码器的语音生成合成器CosyVoice，它由一个用于文本到词元生成的LLM和一个用于词元到语音合成的条件流匹配模型组成。实验结果表明，监督语义词元在零样本语音克隆的内容一致性和说话人相似度方面显著优于现有的无监督词元。此外，我们发现利用大规模数据可以进一步提高合成性能，表明CosyVoice具有可扩展性。据我们所知，这是首次尝试将监督语音词元引入TTS模型。

items.en: Text-to-Speech (TTS) technology has made remarkable strides in recent years, transitioning from robotic-sounding speech to producing voices that are nearly indistinguishable from human speakers. At the forefront of this advancement are Large Language Models (LLMs), which have been increasingly utilized in TTS systems to generate speech with a higher degree of naturalness and the ability to synthesize voices in a zero-shot fashion (Betker, 2023; Wang et al., 2023; Lajszczak et al., 2024). These LLM-based TTS models function by converting speech signals into sequences of tokens, with the LLM utilizing text as a condition to model these token sequences. A token vocoder is then employed to reconstruct the raw waveforms from the tokenized speech (Kong et al., 2020; Défossez et al., 2022).
items.zh: 文本转语音（TTS）技术近年来取得了显著进展，从机器合成语音转变为产生几乎与人类说话者无法区分的语音。这一进步的前沿是大语言模型（LLM），它们越来越多地被用于TTS系统，以生成具有更高自然度和零样本合成能力的语音（Betker, 2023; Wang et al., 2023; Lajszczak et al., 2024）。这些基于LLM的TTS模型通过将语音信号转换为词元序列来工作，LLM以文本为条件对这些词元序列进行建模。然后使用词元声码器从词元化语音中重建原始波形（Kong et al., 2020; Défossez et al., 2022）。

items.en: A critical aspect of the TTS process is the representation of speech tokens. Traditionally, tokens are acquired through unsupervised learning, which may not capture explicit semantic information or align well with corresponding text (Hsu et al., 2021; Défossez et al., 2022). Recognizing this gap, our work introduces supervised semantic tokens extracted from a multilingual speech recognition model, Whisper (Radford et al., 2023), by integrating vector quantization into the encoder. This innovation allows for more accurate semantic representation and alignment with text. Early studies have shown that quantizers with auxiliary automatic speech recognition (ASR) loss outperform k-means clustering on the universal speech model (USM) for speech-to-text translation and ASR tasks, as demonstrated in Rubenstein et al. (2023). Additionally, Ye et al. (2024) employed Gumbel-Softmax vector quantization to extract discrete speech representations that prioritize ASR-relevant information for ASR tasks. However, the impact of these approaches on text-to-speech (TTS) remains unclear.
items.zh: TTS过程的一个关键方面是语音词元的表示。传统上，词元通过无监督学习获得，这可能无法捕获明确的语义信息或与相应文本良好对齐（Hsu et al., 2021; Défossez et al., 2022）。认识到这一差距，我们的工作引入了从多语言语音识别模型Whisper（Radford et al., 2023）中提取的监督语义词元，方法是将向量量化集成到编码器中。这一创新使得更准确的语义表示和与文本的对齐成为可能。早期研究表明，在通用语音模型（USM）上，带有辅助自动语音识别（ASR）损失的量化器在语音到文本翻译和ASR任务中优于k-means聚类，如Rubenstein等人（2023）所示。此外，Ye等人（2024）使用Gumbel-Softmax向量量化来提取优先考虑ASR相关信息的离散语音表示，用于ASR任务。然而，这些方法对文本转语音（TTS）的影响尚不清楚。

items.en: Furthermore, leveraging these supervised tokens, we propose CosyVoice, a scalable and efficient zero-shot TTS synthesizer. CosyVoice is comprised of an LLM for converting text into semantic token sequences and a conditional flow matching model for the subsequent synthesis of speech from these tokens. In contrast to prior systems like TorToise TTS (Betker, 2023), which employs an LLM in conjunction with a denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPM) (Ho et al., 2020), CosyVoice utilizes a conditional flow matching approach, as it has been demonstrated to accelerate both training and inference compared to traditional diffusion models (Le et al., 2024). While existing methods incorporate flow matching in TTS (Le et al., 2024; Guo et al., 2023; Mehta et al., 2023; Guan et al., 2023), they often rely on phoneme duration prediction, necessitating the use of supplementary phonemizers and forced aligners. CosyVoice, however, bypasses these dependencies, offering a more direct and efficient pathway from text to speech.
items.zh: 此外，利用这些监督词元，我们提出了CosyVoice，一个可扩展且高效的零样本TTS合成器。CosyVoice由一个用于将文本转换为语义词元序列的LLM和一个用于从这些词元合成语音的条件流匹配模型组成。与之前的系统如TorToise TTS（Betker, 2023）不同，后者使用LLM结合去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）（Ho et al., 2020），CosyVoice采用条件流匹配方法，因为与传统的扩散模型相比，它已被证明可以加速训练和推理（Le et al., 2024）。虽然现有方法在TTS中使用了流匹配（Le et al., 2024; Guo et al., 2023; Mehta et al., 2023; Guan et al., 2023），但它们通常依赖于音素持续时间预测，需要使用额外的音素器和强制对齐器。然而，CosyVoice绕过了这些依赖，提供了从文本到语音更直接和高效的路径。

items.en: Our research contributes to the field of speech generation in several novel ways:
items.zh: 我们的研究在语音生成领域做出了几项新颖的贡献：

items.en: We are the first to integrate supervised speech tokens into TTS models, enhancing content consistency and speaker similarity in zero-shot voice cloning.
items.zh: 我们首次将监督语音词元集成到TTS模型中，增强了零样本语音克隆的内容一致性和说话人相似度。

items.en: We propose CosyVoice, a scalable zero-shot TTS synthesis system that combines an LLM for text-to-token generation with a conditional flow matching model for token-to-speech synthesis, forsaking the need for additional phonemizers and forced aligners.
items.zh: 我们提出了CosyVoice，一个可扩展的零样本TTS合成系统，它结合了用于文本到词元生成的LLM和用于词元到语音合成的条件流匹配模型，无需额外的音素器和强制对齐器。

items.en: To further refine the quality of generated speech, we incorporate the x-vector (Snyder et al., 2018) into the LLM to separate the modeling of speech into semantic, speaker, and prosody components. The LLM models the semantic content and prosody, while the conditional flow matching model captures timbre and environmental information. We optimize the flow matching process with techniques such as classifier-free guidance (Ho and Salimans, 2022a), a cosine scheduler, and masked conditions.
items.zh: 为了进一步提高生成语音的质量，我们将x-vector（Snyder et al., 2018）纳入LLM，将语音建模分解为语义、说话人和韵律组件。LLM对语义内容和韵律进行建模，而条件流匹配模型捕获音色和环境信息。我们通过无分类器指导（Ho and Salimans, 2022a）、余弦调度器和掩码条件等技术优化了流匹配过程。

items.en: Our experimental results demonstrate the superiority of supervised semantic tokens over unsupervised counterparts. Additionally, the scalability of CosyVoice is evidenced by improved synthesis performance when utilizing large-scale data. This work, therefore, represents a significant step forward in the development of natural-sounding, versatile TTS systems.
items.zh: 我们的实验结果表明了监督语义词元相对于无监督对应物的优越性。此外，CosyVoice的可扩展性通过利用大规模数据时合成性能的提高得到证明。因此，这项工作代表了在开发自然、多功能TTS系统方面迈出的重要一步。

items.capEn: Figure 1: An overview of the proposed CosyVoice model. (a) demonstrates the 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokenizer, where dashed modules are only used at the training stage. (b) is a schematic diagram of CosyVoice, consisting of a text-to-token LLM and a token-to-speech flow matching model. S, E and T denote the “start of sequence”, “end of sequence” and “turn of speech” tokens. Dashed lines indicate the autoregressive decoding at the inference stage. (c) provides an enlarged view of our flow matching model conditioning on a speaker embedding 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}, semantic tokens μ𝜇\mu, masked speech features X~~𝑋\tilde{X} and intermediate state Xtsubscript𝑋𝑡X_{t} at timestep t𝑡t on the probabilistic density path.
items.capZh: 图1：提出的CosyVoice模型概述。(a)展示了S³分词器，其中虚线模块仅在训练阶段使用。(b)是CosyVoice的示意图，包括一个文本到词元LLM和一个词元到语音流匹配模型。S、E和T分别表示“序列开始”、“序列结束”和“语音轮次”词元。虚线表示推理阶段的自回归解码。(c)提供了我们的流匹配模型的放大视图，该模型在概率密度路径上以说话人嵌入v、语义词元μ、掩码语音特征X̃和中间状态X_t（时间步t）为条件。

full.sec: 2 CosyVoice: A Scalable TTS model using Supervised Semantic Tokens
full.secZh: 2 CosyVoice：基于监督语义标记的可扩展TTS模型

items.en: As shown in Figure 1(b), our CosyVoice consists of four components, namely text encoder, speech tokenizer, large language model and conditional flow matching model. Specifically, the text encoder is used to align the semantic spaces of text and speech tokens, while the speech tokenizer is utilized to extract semantic tokens as illustrated in Figure 1(a). We employ a large language model to learn the whole sequence of text encodings and speech tokens, reformulating TTS as an auto-regressive sequence generation problem given text as prompts. Then, as shown in Figure 1(c), a conditional flow matching model is utilized to convert speech tokens into a Mel spectrogram via a denoising process on the optimal path. To obtain a perceptible signal, the HifiGAN vocoder (Kong et al., 2020) is used to synthesize a waveform with the generated Mel spectrogram as input.
items.zh: 如图1(b)所示，我们的CosyVoice由四个组件组成，即文本编码器、语音分词器、大语言模型和条件流匹配模型。具体来说，文本编码器用于对齐文本和语音词元的语义空间，而语音分词器用于提取语义词元，如图1(a)所示。我们使用大语言模型来学习文本编码和语音词元的整个序列，将TTS重新表述为以文本为提示的自回归序列生成问题。然后，如图1(c)所示，使用条件流匹配模型通过最优路径上的去噪过程将语音词元转换为梅尔频谱图。为了获得可感知的信号，使用HifiGAN声码器（Kong et al., 2020）以生成的梅尔频谱图为输入合成波形。

full.secZh: 2.1 用于语音的监督语义标记

items.en: In CosyVoice, a supervised automatic speech recognition (ASR) model is employed to derive the supervised semantic speech (𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3}) tokenizer for speech. The model is a finetuned version of our proprietary SenseVoice ASR model. It is trained on multilingual audio data and possesses rich audio content understanding capabilities. Different from the original ASR model, we split the encoder into two parts and insert a vector quantization layer between them. Given a Mel spectrogram X𝑋X as input, it undergoes the positional encoding and Encoder1subscriptEncoder1\mathrm{Encoder}_{1} to obtain a context-aware representations H𝐻H:
items.zh: 在CosyVoice中，采用监督自动语音识别（ASR）模型来导出用于语音的监督语义语音（S³）分词器。该模型是我们专有SenseVoice ASR模型的微调版本。它在多语言音频数据上训练，并具有丰富的音频内容理解能力。与原始ASR模型不同，我们将编码器分成两部分，并在它们之间插入一个向量量化层。给定梅尔频谱图X作为输入，它经过位置编码和Encoder1以获得上下文感知表示H：

items.en: Then, a vector quantizer (VQ) is involved to obtain discrete tokens. For the hidden representation 𝐡lsubscript𝐡𝑙\mathbf{h}_{l} at the frame l𝑙l, the index of nearest embedding in the codebook C𝐶C is treated as the speech token μlsubscript𝜇𝑙\mu_{l} at this timestep:
items.zh: 然后，引入向量量化器（VQ）以获得离散词元。对于帧l处的隐藏表示h_l，码本C中最近嵌入的索引被视为该时间步的语音词元μ_l：

items.zh: 其中||·||₂表示L2范数。在训练阶段，码本嵌入通过指数移动平均（EMA）更新：

items.en: where α𝛼\alpha is a pre-defined decay coefficient. The corresponding codebook embeddings of speech tokens are used as the quantized hidden representations H¯={𝐜μ1,𝐜μ2,…,𝐜μL}¯𝐻subscript𝐜subscript𝜇1subscript𝐜subscript𝜇2…subscript𝐜subscript𝜇𝐿\bar{H}=\{\mathbf{c}_{\mu_{1}},\mathbf{c}_{\mu_{2}},\dots,\mathbf{c}_{\mu_{L}}\} and passed through the remaining encoder layers Encoder2subscriptEncoder2\mathrm{Encoder}_{2}:
items.zh: 其中α是预定义的衰减系数。语音词元对应的码本嵌入用作量化隐藏表示H̄ = {c_{μ_1}, c_{μ_2}, …, c_{μ_L}}，并通过剩余的编码器层Encoder2：

items.en: Note that, before the remaining encoder layers, we add an extra positional encoding to enhance the temporal information. After Encoder2subscriptEncoder2\mathrm{Encoder_{2}}, a transformer-based ASR decoder is followed, predicting the posterior probability of text labels:
items.zh: 注意，在剩余的编码器层之前，我们添加了额外的位置编码以增强时间信息。在Encoder2之后，跟随一个基于Transformer的ASR解码器，预测文本标签的后验概率：

items.en: where YZ−1superscript𝑌𝑍1Y^{Z-1} represents the left-shifted text labels in the teacher-forcing training scheme.
items.zh: 其中Y^{Z-1}表示在教师强制训练方案中左移的文本标签。

items.en: In this section, we formulate the TTS task as an auto-regressive speech token generation problem with a large language model (LLM). For LLM, the sequence construction is the most important matter, which is constructed as follows:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将TTS任务公式化为使用大语言模型（LLM）的自回归语音词元生成问题。对于LLM，序列构建是最重要的问题，其构建如下：

items.en: and E denote the start and end of sequence, respectively. 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} is a speaker embedding vector extracted from the speech X𝑋X with a pre-trained voice-print model222Available at https://github.com/alibaba-damo-academy/ 3D-Speaker/tree/main/egs/3dspeaker/sv-cam++. The text encodings Y¯={𝐲¯u}u⁣∈⁣[1:U]¯𝑌subscriptsubscript¯𝐲𝑢𝑢delimited-[]:1𝑈\bar{Y}=\{\bar{\mathbf{y}}_{u}\}_{u\in[1:U]} is obtained by passing the text through a Byte Pair Encoded (BPE) tokenizer and text encoder:
items.zh: S和E分别表示序列的开始和结束。v是从语音X中提取的说话人嵌入向量，使用预训练的声纹模型。文本编码Ȳ = {ȳ_u}_{u∈[1:U]}通过将文本通过字节对编码（BPE）分词器和文本编码器获得：

items.en: Since text and speech tokens lie at different semantic levels, the text encoder is used to align their semantic spaces and benefit the LLM modeling. A start identifier T is inserted between text encodings and speech tokens {μl}l⁣∈⁣[1:L]subscriptsubscript𝜇𝑙𝑙delimited-[]:1𝐿\{\mu_{l}\}_{l\in[1:L]} that is extracted with the supervised semantic tokenizer as described in 2.1. At the training stage, we employ the teacher-forcing scheme, in which the left-shifted sequence is employed as the mode inputs and the original sequence serves as the expected outputs. Note that only the cross entropy losses of speech tokens and E are considered during the training:
items.zh: 由于文本和语音词元处于不同的语义层次，文本编码器用于对齐它们的语义空间并有利于LLM建模。在文本编码和语音词元{μ_l}_{l∈[1:L]}之间插入一个起始标识符T，这些语音词元使用第2.1节中描述的监督语义分词器提取。在训练阶段，我们采用教师强制方案，其中左移序列用作模型输入，原始序列用作期望输出。注意，在训练期间仅考虑语音词元和E的交叉熵损失：

items.en: where μL+1subscript𝜇𝐿1\mu_{L+1} is the “end of sequence” token E. q​(μl)𝑞subscript𝜇𝑙q(\mu_{l}) denotes the posterior probability of μlsubscript𝜇𝑙\mu_{l}, which is predicted by the softmax layer following LLM.
items.zh: 其中 μL+1 是“序列结束”标记 E。q(μl) 表示 μl 的后验概率，由 LLM 后的 softmax 层预测。

items.en: In CosyVoice, an optimal-transport conditional flow matching model (OT-CFM) is employed to learn the distribution of Mel spectrogram and generate samples from it with generated speech tokens as conditions. OT-CFM can achieve better performance compared to diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs) with simpler gradients, easier training and faster generation Lipman et al. (2023); Tong et al. (2023); Mehta et al. (2023). In continuous-time normalizing flows (CNFs), a probability density path is constructed from a prior distribution p0​(X)subscript𝑝0𝑋p_{0}(X) to the data distribution of Mel spectrogram q​(X)𝑞𝑋q(X). The probability density path is defined by a time-dependent vector field νt​(X):[0,1]×ℝL∗D→ℝL∗D:subscript𝜈𝑡𝑋→01superscriptℝ𝐿𝐷superscriptℝ𝐿𝐷\nu_{t}(X):[0,1]\times\mathbb{R}^{L*D}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}^{L*D}, which generates the flow ϕtsubscriptitalic-ϕ𝑡\phi_{t} through the following ordinary differential equation (ODE):
items.zh: 在 CosyVoice 中，采用最优传输条件流匹配模型（OT-CFM）来学习 Mel 频谱图的分布，并以生成的语音标记为条件从中生成样本。与扩散概率模型（DPM）相比，OT-CFM 可以实现更好的性能，具有更简单的梯度、更易训练和更快的生成速度（Lipman et al., 2023; Tong et al., 2023; Mehta et al., 2023）。在连续时间归一化流（CNF）中，从先验分布 p0(X) 到 Mel 频谱图的数据分布 q(X) 构建概率密度路径。概率密度路径由时间相关的向量场 νt(X): [0,1] × ℝ^(L*D) → ℝ^(L*D) 定义，该向量场通过以下常微分方程（ODE）生成流 φt：

items.en: where t∈[0,1]𝑡01t\in[0,1]. By solving the initial value problem Eq. (9), we can approximate the speech distribution q​(X)𝑞𝑋q(X) with p1​(X)subscript𝑝1𝑋p_{1}(X) and sample from it. To learn the vector field νt​(X)subscript𝜈𝑡𝑋\nu_{t}(X), we define the optimal-transport (OT) flow and force a neural network to match it by minimizing the following loss:
items.zh: 其中 t ∈ [0,1]。通过求解初值问题式（9），我们可以用 p1(X) 近似语音分布 q(X) 并从中采样。为了学习向量场 νt(X)，我们定义最优传输（OT）流，并通过最小化以下损失强制神经网络匹配它：

items.en: The speaker embedding 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v}, speech tokens {μl}1:Lsubscriptsubscript𝜇𝑙:1𝐿\{\mu_{l}\}_{1:L}, and masked Mel spectrogram X1~~subscript𝑋1\tilde{X_{1}} are also fed into the neural network to match the vector field with learnable parameters θ𝜃\theta:
items.zh: 说话人嵌入 v、语音标记 {μl}_{1:L} 和掩码 Mel 频谱图 X̃1 也被输入神经网络，以匹配具有可学习参数 θ 的向量场：

items.en: X1~~subscript𝑋1\tilde{X_{1}} is a masked version of X1subscript𝑋1X_{1} by setting continuous frames to zeros from a random start point to the end. Considering the generation process at the beginning is harder than follows, we involve a cosine scheduler for the timestep t𝑡t:
items.zh: X̃1 是 X1 的掩码版本，通过将连续帧从随机起点到末尾设置为零得到。考虑到生成过程开始时比后续更难，我们为时间步 t 引入余弦调度器：

items.en: Under the scheduled flow, there are more generation steps at the beginning.
items.zh: 在调度流下，开始时生成步骤更多。

items.en: Classifier-free guidance (CFG) has been proven to improve the generation quality of diffusion probabilistic models Ho and Salimans (2022b); Nichol and Dhariwal (2021); Le et al. (2024). Therefore, we propose to adapt the CFG into conditional flow matching models. At the training stage, we randomly drop the conditions Ψ={𝐯,{μl}1:L,X1~}Ψ𝐯subscriptsubscript𝜇𝑙:1𝐿~subscript𝑋1\Psi=\{\mathbf{v},\{\mu_{l}\}_{1:L},\tilde{X_{1}}\} with a fixed probability of 0.20.20.2. In this manner, we can learn both conditional and unconditional flows. During generation, the vector field is modified as follows:
items.zh: 无分类器引导（CFG）已被证明可以提高扩散概率模型的生成质量（Ho and Salimans, 2022b; Nichol and Dhariwal, 2021; Le et al., 2024）。因此，我们提出将 CFG 适配到条件流匹配模型中。在训练阶段，我们以 0.2 的固定概率随机丢弃条件 Ψ = {v, {μl}_{1:L}, X̃1}。这样，我们可以同时学习条件流和无条件流。在生成过程中，向量场修改如下：

items.en: where β𝛽\beta is the guidance strength of 0.70.70.7.
items.zh: 其中 β 是引导强度，取值为 0.7。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Sequence construction for (a) zero-shot in-context learning and (b) cross-lingual voice cloning. LID represents language identifier.
items.capZh: 图 2：（a）零样本上下文学习和（b）跨语言语音克隆的序列构建。LID 表示语言标识符。

items.en: CosyVoice models exhibit zero-shot in-context learning capabilities, allowing for the replication of an arbitrary voice with only a brief reference speech sample. This process entails the careful construction of input sequences for the token language model (LM), depicted in Figure 2. For prompt speech and input text in the same language, we merge them to form a unified input, treating the prompt speech tokens as pre-generated. With this input sequence, the autoregressive LM iteratively predicts subsequent tokens until it encounters the “end of sequence” token E. However, when the prompt speech and input text differ linguistically, we omit the text and tokens associated with the prompt to prevent prosodic characteristics of the original language from influencing the target language. It is important to note that the prompt text, which corresponds to the prompt speech’s content, can be transcribed either through human annotation or ASR models, such as SenseVoice. Similar to the prompt text, the prompt tokens are extracted from the prompt speech with 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokenizer.
items.zh: CosyVoice 模型展现出零样本上下文学习能力，仅需一段简短的参考语音样本即可复制任意声音。此过程涉及为标记语言模型（LM）精心构建输入序列，如图 2 所示。对于相同语言的提示语音和输入文本，我们将它们合并为统一输入，将提示语音标记视为预生成的。使用此输入序列，自回归 LM 迭代预测后续标记，直到遇到“序列结束”标记 E。然而，当提示语音和输入文本语言不同时，我们省略与提示相关的文本和标记，以防止原始语言的韵律特征影响目标语言。需要注意的是，提示文本（对应提示语音的内容）可以通过人工标注或 ASR 模型（如 SenseVoice）转录。与提示文本类似，提示标记通过 𝒮³ 分词器从提示语音中提取。

items.en: After generating the speech tokens, they are appended after the prompt tokens, forming a composite condition for the flow-matching model. Additionally, the speaker embedding and the Mel spectrogram of the prompt speech are incorporated to further enhance timbre and environmental consistency.
items.zh: 生成语音标记后，它们被附加到提示标记之后，形成流匹配模型的复合条件。此外，还加入了提示语音的说话人嵌入和 Mel 频谱图，以进一步增强音色和环境一致性。

items.en: To enable further controllability on CosyVoice, we experiment with integrating additional instruction fine-tuning (Ji et al., 2023). CosyVoice-instruct extends CosyVoice-base with enhanced instruction-following capabilities. Specifically, it supports controllability over various aspects such as speaker identity (i.e., speaker’s characteristics), speaking style (including emotion, gender, speaking rate, and pitch), and fine-grained paralinguistic features. These features include the ability to insert laughter, breaths, speaking while laughing, and emphasize certain words.
items.zh: 为了进一步增强 CosyVoice 的可控性，我们尝试集成额外的指令微调（Ji et al., 2023）。CosyVoice-instruct 扩展了 CosyVoice-base，增强了指令遵循能力。具体来说，它支持对说话人身份（即说话人特征）、说话风格（包括情感、性别、语速和音高）以及细粒度副语言特征等方面的可控性。这些特征包括插入笑声、呼吸、边说边笑以及强调某些词语的能力。

items.en: We fine-tuned CosyVoice-base using this training data without incorporating speaker embedding in the autoregressive language model. Table 1 shows some examples of speaker identity, speaking style, and fine-grained paralinguistic features.
items.zh: 我们使用此训练数据对 CosyVoice-base 进行了微调，在自回归语言模型中未加入说话人嵌入。表 1 展示了说话人身份、说话风格和细粒度副语言特征的一些示例。

items.en: We conduct experiments on the LibriTTS (Zen et al., 2019) corpus, which contains 585 hours from 2,456 English speakers. We follow the official data partition, where “train-clean-100”, “train-clean-360” and “train-other-500” are merged for training and the “dev-clean” is used for model selections. “test-clean” is used to construct the evaluation set as described in (Du et al., 2024).
items.zh: 我们在 LibriTTS（Zen et al., 2019）语料库上进行了实验，该语料库包含 2,456 位英语说话人的 585 小时语音。我们遵循官方数据划分，将“train-clean-100”、“train-clean-360”和“train-other-500”合并用于训练，并使用“dev-clean”进行模型选择。使用“test-clean”构建评估集，如（Du et al., 2024）所述。

items.en: To train the CosyVoice models, we have amassed a considerable dataset comprising multiple languages. Throughout the collection process, we utilize specialized in-house tools for speech detection, signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimation, speaker diarization, and separation. Subsequently, pseudo text labels are generated using SenseVoice-Large and Paraformer. These labels undergo a refinement process with the aid of force-alignment (FA) models, which helps eliminate low-quality data and enhances the accuracy of punctuation. A comprehensive breakdown of the training data’s duration across various languages is presented in Table 2. Table 3 presents the duration of the training data for different types of instructions.
items.zh: 为了训练 CosyVoice 模型，我们收集了一个包含多种语言的大型数据集。在收集过程中，我们使用专门的内部工具进行语音检测、信噪比（SNR）估计、说话人日志和分离。随后，使用 SenseVoice-Large 和 Paraformer 生成伪文本标签。这些标签通过强制对齐（FA）模型进行精炼，有助于消除低质量数据并提高标点符号的准确性。表 2 展示了不同语言训练数据的时长细分。表 3 展示了不同类型指令的训练数据时长。

items.en: For the small-scale single-lingual dataset, we employ the ESPNet Conformer ASR model as the backbone and insert the vector quantizer after the first six encoder layers. There is a single codebook with 4,096 codes. The first six encoder layers and vector quantizer are employed as the speech tokenizer. As for the text tokenizer, a word sentence-piece model is trained on the text of training, which has a vocabulary size of 4,000. We train the quantizer-augmented ASR model on the Librispeech Panayotov et al. (2015) corpus for 50 epochs from scratch.
items.zh: 对于小规模单语言数据集，我们采用 ESPNet Conformer ASR 模型作为主干，并在前六个编码器层之后插入向量量化器。使用单个码本，包含 4,096 个码字。前六个编码器层和向量量化器用作语音分词器。对于文本分词器，在训练文本上训练了一个词 sentence-piece 模型，词汇量为 4,000。我们在 Librispeech（Panayotov et al., 2015）语料库上从头训练了增强量化器的 ASR 模型 50 个 epoch。

items.en: For the large-scale multi-lingual dataset, we employ the SenseVoice-Large rich recognition model (TongyiSpeech, 2024) as the backbone. Similar to small-scale dataset, we still insert the vector quantizer after the first six encoder layers with a single codebook of 4,096 codes. More hyper-parameter selections, such as quantizer-inserted layer and the number of codes, are left for future work. Different from single-lingual experiments, we use the pre-trained checkpoint to initialize the SenseVoice-Large model rather than train it from scratch. After inserting the quantizer, we further fine-tune the whole parameters for 210,000 training steps on eight A800 GPUs.
items.zh: 对于大规模多语言数据集，我们采用 SenseVoice-Large 丰富识别模型（TongyiSpeech, 2024）作为主干。与小规模数据集类似，我们仍然在前六个编码器层之后插入向量量化器，使用单个码本，包含 4,096 个码字。更多超参数选择（如量化器插入层和码字数量）留待未来工作。与单语言实验不同，我们使用预训练检查点初始化 SenseVoice-Large 模型，而不是从头训练。插入量化器后，我们在八块 A800 GPU 上进一步微调所有参数 210,000 步。

items.en: We train the tiny and normal size models in single-lingual and multi-lingual experiments. Details of model architecture settings are shown in Table 4. The tiny model is trained on LibriTTS training set for 50 epochs with four V100-32M GPUs, while the multi-lingual model is trained on our internal dataset for 800,000 steps with 64 V100-32M GPUs. Tiny and normal models are trained with the learning rate of 10−3superscript10310^{-3} and 10−4superscript10410^{-4}, respectively. The warmup step is set to 10,000.
items.zh: 我们在单语言和多语言实验中训练了 tiny 和 normal 尺寸的模型。模型架构设置的详细信息见表 4。Tiny 模型在 LibriTTS 训练集上使用四块 V100-32M GPU 训练 50 个 epoch，而多语言模型使用 64 块 V100-32M GPU 在我们的内部数据集上训练 800,000 步。Tiny 和 normal 模型的学习率分别为 10⁻³ 和 10⁻⁴。预热步数设置为 10,000。

items.en: In table 5, we demonstrate how the vector quantization affects the recognition performance on LibriTTS test sets. From the table, we can see that inserting a vector quantizer into the ASR encoder only affects the recognition performance slightly. As a result, the VQ-inserted Conformer ASR model achieves comparable WERs of 3.18% and 7.56% on “test-clean” and “test-other” sets, respectively. This indicates that tokenizers trained in a supervised manner can maintain sufficient semantic information and the alignment to text.
items.zh: 在表 5 中，我们展示了向量量化对 LibriTTS 测试集识别性能的影响。从表中可以看出，在 ASR 编码器中插入向量量化器仅轻微影响识别性能。因此，插入 VQ 的 Conformer ASR 模型在“test-clean”和“test-other”集上分别实现了 3.18% 和 7.56% 的相当词错误率（WER）。这表明以监督方式训练的分词器能够保持足够的语义信息以及与文本的对齐。

items.en: To assess the multi-lingual 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokenizer’s ability to preserve semantic information, we compared the recognition performance of the quantizer-augmented SenseVoice-L against its original version and the Whisper-Large V3 model. The models underwent evaluation using the Common Voice zh-CN and en benchmarks, with the findings detailed in Table 6. From the table, we can see that our 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokens demonstrate robust recognition performance in both the Chinese and English test sets. Notably, on the common_voice_zh-CN set, 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokens surpass the performance of the Whisper-Large V3 model TongyiSpeech (2024), achieving a 4.14% relative reduction in error rate. This suggests a substantial correlation between 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokens and semantic content. It is worth noting that there is only a single codebook in the 𝒮3superscript𝒮3\mathcal{S}^{3} tokenizer with a dictionary size of 4,096 entries.
items.zh: 为了评估多语言 𝒮³ 分词器保留语义信息的能力，我们将增强量化器的 SenseVoice-L 与其原始版本以及 Whisper-Large V3 模型的识别性能进行了比较。使用 Common Voice zh-CN 和 en 基准对模型进行了评估，结果详见表 6。从表中可以看出，我们的 𝒮³ 标记在中文和英文测试集上都表现出稳健的识别性能。值得注意的是，在 common_voice_zh-CN 集上，𝒮³ 标记的性能超过了 Whisper-Large V3 模型（TongyiSpeech, 2024），错误率相对降低了 4.14%。这表明 𝒮³ 标记与语义内容之间存在显著相关性。值得注意的是，𝒮³ 分词器中只有一个码本，字典大小为 4,096 个条目。

items.en: We compare the proposed CosyVoice models with other TTS systems on content consistency and speaker similarity. For content consistency, an ASR model is employed to recognize the generated utterances. We report the word error rate (WER), and the number of insertion, deletion and substation errors. As for the speaker similarity, we employ the ERes2Net model (Chen et al., 2023) to extract speaker embeddings of prompt and generated utterances, and their raw cosine similarity is treated as the speaker similarity. Experimental results are shown in Table 7.
items.zh: 我们将提出的CosyVoice模型与其他TTS系统在内容一致性和说话人相似度上进行比较。对于内容一致性，使用ASR模型识别生成的语音。我们报告词错误率（WER）以及插入、删除和替换错误的数量。至于说话人相似度，我们使用ERes2Net模型（Chen等人，2023）提取提示语音和生成语音的说话人嵌入，并将它们的原始余弦相似度视为说话人相似度。实验结果如表7所示。

items.en: Compared with other TTS models, the proposed CosyVoice framework achieves comparable content consistency and higher speaker similarity even using the same text and speech tokenizers. Comparing Exp-1, Exp-2 and Exp-3, we can see that both the text speech tokenizers are critical for content consistency and negligible for speaker similarity. In Exp 4 experiments, we replace the single-lingual text and speech tokenizers with the multi-lingual one. Only using the LibriTTS corpus to train the model degrades both the content consistency and speaker similarity. By involving the internal large-scale dataset, the performance is significantly improved, achieving the human parity quality.
items.zh: 与其他TTS模型相比，提出的CosyVoice框架即使使用相同的文本和语音分词器，也能实现相当的内容一致性和更高的说话人相似度。比较Exp-1、Exp-2和Exp-3，我们可以看到文本和语音分词器对内容一致性至关重要，而对说话人相似度影响可忽略。在Exp-4实验中，我们将单语文本和语音分词器替换为多语分词器。仅使用LibriTTS语料库训练模型会降低内容一致性和说话人相似度。通过引入内部大规模数据集，性能显著提升，达到了人类水平的质量。

full.sec: 5.3 Evaluation on Generation Quality of CosyVoice

items.en: We evaluate the quality of CosyVoice’s speech synthesis by examining content consistency and speaker similarity. The “test-clean” subset of LibriTTS (Zen et al., 2019) and the test set of AISHELL-3 (Shi et al., 2021) are employed to construct an evaluation set for English and Chinese, respectively. For each text in these sets, we randomly select a prompt speech. Content consistency was evaluated using Whisper-Large V3 (Radford et al., 2023) for English and Paraformer (Gao et al., 2022) for Chinese recognition. Speaker similarity was quantified by calculating the cosine similarity between speaker embeddings of the generated and prompt speeches, extracted using ERes2Net (Chen et al., 2023).
items.zh: 我们通过检查内容一致性和说话人相似度来评估CosyVoice语音合成的质量。使用LibriTTS（Zen等人，2019）的“test-clean”子集和AISHELL-3（Shi等人，2021）的测试集分别构建英语和中文的评估集。对于这些集中的每个文本，我们随机选择一个提示语音。内容一致性使用Whisper-Large V3（Radford等人，2023）进行英语识别，使用Paraformer（Gao等人，2022）进行中文识别。说话人相似度通过计算生成语音和提示语音的说话人嵌入之间的余弦相似度来量化，嵌入使用ERes2Net（Chen等人，2023）提取。

items.en: Similar to other autoregressive language models, we employ a random sampling decoding strategy for our token LM and assessed the synthesis process using five different random seed values: 0, 7, 42, 123, and 1,337. The resultant evaluation metrics were averaged to determine the mean and standard deviation. Additionally, we conducted an ASR re-ranking to demonstrate potential performance improvements in offline mode.
items.zh: 与其他自回归语言模型类似，我们对令牌LM采用随机采样解码策略，并使用五个不同的随机种子值（0、7、42、123和1,337）评估合成过程。结果评估指标取平均值以确定均值和标准差。此外，我们进行了ASR重排序，以展示离线模式下潜在的性能提升。

items.en: As for the results in Chinese, the generated utterances of CosyVoice achieve a comparable CER as well as the errors of insertion and deletion compared with the original utterances. It seems that ChatTTS has a better generation ability on Chinese than English in terms of CER. Although ChatTTS and CosyVoice achieve a similar CER, ChatTTS produces more insertion and deletion errors, This is due to the problem of speaker leaking, where modal particles of another speaker is generated unexpectedly. On the contrary, CosyVoice doesn’t suffer from this problem with much fewer insertion and deletion errors. With ASR re-ranking, CosyVoice reached a remarkably low CER of 1.84%. As seen with English, CosyVoice also exhibited greater speaker similarity than the original utterances, showcasing its effective voice-cloning proficiency.
items.zh: 至于中文结果，CosyVoice生成的语音与原始语音相比，实现了相当的CER以及插入和删除错误。就CER而言，ChatTTS在中文上的生成能力似乎优于英文。尽管ChatTTS和CosyVoice实现了相似的CER，但ChatTTS产生了更多的插入和删除错误，这是由于说话人泄露问题，即意外生成了另一个说话人的语气词。相反，CosyVoice没有这个问题，插入和删除错误少得多。通过ASR重排序，CosyVoice达到了极低的1.84%的CER。与英语一样，CosyVoice在说话人相似度上也优于原始语音，展示了其有效的语音克隆能力。

items.en: To verify the emotion controllability, we use the public speech emotion recognition model emo2vec333https://modelscope.cn/models/iic/emotion2vec_base_finetuned (Ma et al., 2023). We generated and evaluated 100 English utterances for each of the six emotions: happy, angry, sad, surprised, fearful, and disgusted. The content of the synthesized text is designed to match the target emotion. We then measure the accuracy of the predicted emotions from the synthesized speech for each emotion.
items.zh: 为了验证情感可控性，我们使用公开的语音情感识别模型emo2vec（Ma等人，2023）。我们为六种情感（快乐、愤怒、悲伤、惊讶、恐惧和厌恶）各生成并评估了100个英语语音。合成文本的内容设计为匹配目标情感。然后我们测量每种情感下合成语音预测情感的准确率。

items.en: A straightforward application of CosyVoice is as a data generator to augment the training data of other tasks, such as ASR, speech-to-speech translation (S2ST). Taking the ASR task an example, we conduct an experiment on the Librispeech corpus to evaluate CosyVoice’s capability in generating high-quality data. The experimental results are shown in Table 11, where “Librispeech” denotes the original 960-hour data. “Syn on LS text” and “Syn on LS text” denote the generated data with the text from Librispeech and MLS training sets, respectively. From the table, we can see that only training on the synthesized data, the ASR model can achieve a comparable result than the original Librispeech training set. Upon integration of them, a notable enhancement in recognition accuracy is observed. An interesting finding is that involving the synthesized data on the MLS text significantly improves the recognition performance. This may indicates that the text diversity is more critical for ASR task than the duration of speech itself. This improvement can be attributed to the varied linguistic content introduced by CosyVoice synthesized samples. The findings from our evaluation underscore the high quality of the samples generated by CosyVoice.
items.zh: CosyVoice的一个直接应用是作为数据生成器，用于增强其他任务（如ASR、语音到语音翻译（S2ST））的训练数据。以ASR任务为例，我们在Librispeech语料库上进行实验，评估CosyVoice生成高质量数据的能力。实验结果如表11所示，其中“Librispeech”表示原始的960小时数据。“Syn on LS text”和“Syn on MLS text”分别表示使用Librispeech和MLS训练集的文本生成的数据。从表中可以看出，仅使用合成数据训练，ASR模型就能达到与原始Librispeech训练集相当的结果。当将它们整合时，识别准确率显著提升。一个有趣的发现是，使用MLS文本的合成数据显著提高了识别性能。这可能表明文本多样性对ASR任务比语音本身的时长更为关键。这种改进可归因于CosyVoice合成样本引入的多样化语言内容。我们的评估结果强调了CosyVoice生成样本的高质量。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce CosyVoice, a scalable multi-lingual speech generation model, which supports zero-shot in-context learning, cross-lingual voice cloning, instructed generation and fine-grained controlling of emotion, paralinguistic features. Experimental results show that the system architecture of CosyVoice is important for speaker similarity, while the text and speech tokenizers affect the content consistency much. Besides, we find that scaling up the model size and data volume can improve the performance significantly. As a result, CosyVoice achieves the human parity generation quality.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了CosyVoice，一个可扩展的多语言语音生成模型，支持零样本上下文学习、跨语言语音克隆、指令生成以及情感和副语言特征的细粒度控制。实验结果表明，CosyVoice的系统架构对说话人相似度很重要，而文本和语音分词器对内容一致性影响更大。此外，我们发现扩大模型大小和数据量可以显著提升性能。因此，CosyVoice实现了人类水平的生成质量。
